chords.title: Praise
chords.chords:
Intro:  A

Verse:  A   A - D   A   A
        E   D   A   A

Pre-chorus:  E   D

Chorus:  F#m   D    A   E 

--To Bridge--

Bridge:  A   Bm   C#m   D  (2x)

chords.title: God is Good
chords.chords:
Intro:  F   G   Dm - C   G 

Chorus:  C   G   Dm - C   G
         C   Am   Dm - C   G
         F   G   C 

Verse:  C   Am   Dm - F   Am - G   Em
        F   Dm - Am   G
        Dm   G   F   Dm - G

Bridge:  Am   Em   Gm   F
         G#   D#   Dm - C   G

Instrumental:  F   F   G   G   A#   A#   A   A

Cambio:  D   A   Em - D   A
         D  Bm   Em - D   A   

Last 3:  G   A   (3x)
Outro:  D - Em   D - G   Am   Am  D

chords.title: Living Hope | What A Beautiful Name
chords.chords:
Intro:  A   D

Verse 1 & 2:  A   E   D - F#m   E
              A   E   D - E   A

Chorus:  D - A   E - F#m  (3x)
         D - E   A

Verse 3:  A   E   D - F#m   E (4x)
          A   E
          D - E   F#m - C#m
          D - E   A

--What A Beautiful Name--

Bridge:  D   E   F#m   C#m (2x)
Chorus:  A   E   F#m - E   D

chords.title: Thankyou Jesus for the Blood
chords.chords:
Verse:  A#   Gm   D# - A#   F

Chorus:  A# - F,  A#   D# - A#
         Gm - F,  A#   Gm - F
         Gm - F - D# - A#   D# - F - Gm
         D# - A#   F - A#

(To Verse: A#)

Bridge: D#   F   Gm   Dm

Outro:  D#   A#   Gm   F   
        A#   A# - F   A#
